outcome.text:
33.2.7 *Plantago maritima*-Typ

(5)6–10 poriën; 3,5–5,0 µm; korrelige opercula. Anuli plat, 1,5–3,0 µm. Verrucae (1,0)1,5–4,5 µm. Exine 1,0–1,2 µm.
Porieaantallen: *P. alpina* 7–10; *P. maritima* 5–8; subsp. *serpentina* 6–9.

*Plantago alpina* L. (9)
28,0–35,0 µm, MiW 32,2 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Plantago maritima* L. (6)
27,0–32,3 µm, MiW 29,0 µm; 50 PK, 0a

*Plantago maritima* L. subsp. *serpentina* (ALL.) ARCHANG. (3)
29,3–40,0 µm, MiW 34,3 µm; 50 PK, Oa
